title: Veteran Homes - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Veteran Homes 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON DEPARTMENT OF VETERANS' AFFAIRS STATEWIDE VETERAN SERVICES SALEM OREGON VETERANS' HOMES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Oregon Veterans' Homes provide professional medical, nursing, and long-term care, memory care, and short-term rehabilitative aid during recovery to allow residents to return home after hospitalization. Facilities are located in The Dalles and Lebanon. They are owned by the State of Oregon and are separate from the US Department of Veterans Affairs. 700 Summer Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Honorably discharged veterans and eligible spouses, as well as parents who had a child die while serving in the US Armed Forces Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 296-7190 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON DEPARTMENT OF VETERANS' AFFAIRS OREGON VETERANS' HOMES
